query:
SELECT 
  SUM(CAST(portfolioWeight AS DECIMAL(10,2))) as total_weight,
  SUM(CAST(ytdPerformance AS DECIMAL(10,2)) * CAST(portfolioWeight AS DECIMAL(10,2)) / 100) as weighted_ytd,
  COUNT(*) as total_stocks,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ytdPerformance IS NOT NULL AND ytdPerformance != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as stocks_with_ytd
FROM stocks;

  SUM(CAST(ytdPerformance AS DECIMAL(10,2)) * CAST(portfolioWeight AS DECIMAL(10,2)) / 100) as weighted_ytd,
  COUNT(*) as total_stocks,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ytdPerformance IS NOT NULL AND ytdPerformance != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as stocks_with_ytd
